caption: A surreal, collage-style image features a repetitive composition across four sequences. A stylized, light-blue cat's head wearing a silver party hat is presented as a popsicle on a wooden stick. To the left, green palm trees stand against a pink background filled with floating white circles, while a blue container holds a vibrant pink plant. The text "CLICK HERE TO SUBSCRIBE" appears in a bright blue banner across the top left of each scene. As the sequence progresses, the color of the cat's eyes shifts dynamically: starting as purple, they transition to green, then blue, and finally red. The background elements, including the palms, the plant, and the on-screen text, remain static throughout the changes, while the feline's gaze remains fixed forward.
